summary: Excellent audience recording captures a top‑notch ’79 Dead show, highlighted by a unique Dancin’ > Franklin’s > He’s Gone > Other One sequence.
review: The audience (AUD) source is praised as the most pleasing of any you’ve heard, delivering crisp and immersive sound. Musically the concert shines – reviewers call it “top‑notch ’79 Dead” and single out the second‑set segue Dancin’ → Franklin’s Tower → He’s Gone → The Other One as exquisite. While one reviewer offers a cryptic, less enthusiastic take, the overall impression is of a stellar performance captured in excellent audio.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong positive feedback on both show and recording outweighs one ambiguous review; high‑quality AUD source and standout performances drive a rating near the top of the scale.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as the most pleasing AUD ever heard – clear, balanced, and immersive with no noted flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second‑set opener praised for its unique and exquisite segue, giving the concert a strong, flowing momentum.
